title: peliosanthes khasiana
intro: Peliosanthes khasiana, also known as Khasiana's climbing asparagus or Khasiana's climbing asparagus, is a perennial climber of the Asparagaceae family, native to the Himalayan regions of India, Nepal, and Bhutan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Peliosanthes khasiana include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Peliosanthes khasiana is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
